name: parameterized_module_with_arithmetic_expression_default
description: Code should include a module with a parameter declared as 'parameter integer' where the default value is an arithmetic expression rather than a literal constant. This triggers issues in certain synthesis flows (e.g., synth_gowin) that mishandle the $paramod representation of such modules.

name: always_ff_with_arithmetic_comparison_in_condition
description: Code should include an always_ff block with conditional logic that compares a counter against an arithmetic expression result (e.g., blink_counter < (DIV - 1)). Such comparisons in procedural timing blocks may interact poorly with synthesis optimizations.

name: synth_gowin_with_parameterized_top_module
description: Code should include a parameterized top-level module being processed by the 'synth_gowin' command. The synth_gowin pass appears to have issues with boxed $paramod modules that use integer parameters with arithmetic expression defaults.
